title: Featured Listing
placementType: Priority card on matching public pages
summary: A recurring placement for partners that want steady visibility across high-intent travel pages.
benefits: Priority card placement on one matching section page
Tracked call-to-action link for booking or enquiry traffic
Monthly performance summary for renewals and upgrades

title: Seasonal Campaign Feature
placementType: Campaign bundle across partner page, deals, and booking prompts
summary: A time-boxed promotion for festivals, long weekends, openings, and seasonal offers.
benefits: Campaign story and offer card across relevant pages
Partner offer surfaced inside booking and itinerary prompts

title: Affiliate Booking Row
placementType: Bookable row in the on-site booking demo flow
summary: A performance-led option where ImagineDavao earns from tracked bookings instead of a fixed placement fee.
benefits: Partner row in Flights, Hotels, Experiences, or Cars
Commission or affiliate payout tied to completed partner checkout

title: Qualified Lead Package
partnerType: Tour operators, event organizers, private transport
placementType: Inquiry routing from itinerary and concierge surfaces
summary: A low-friction model for partners that prefer paying only when a traveler asks for a quote or contact.
benefits: Lead capture from relevant planning journeys
Category and city filters to keep enquiries qualified
Lead fee charged only for valid traveller enquiries
